Velocity-based RPE estimated using velocity loss across set (Helms et al. methodology).

1RM estimate uses single-point load-velocity projection with MVT = {MVT} m/s for {EXERCISE.lower()}.

Speed Rating = rep velocity / best rep velocity × 100%.

Note: 1RM estimate from submaximal loads is rough — accuracy improves with heavier loads closer to actual max.
